title: Stack Overflow Scraper
description: Scrape Stack Overflow questions and users via the official Stack Exchange API. No login required (optional API key for higher limits).

searchQueries.title: Search Queries
searchQueries.description: Keywords/phrases to search questions (e.g. "async await", "memory leak").

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Filter by tags (e.g. "javascript", "python"). Used with search, or alone to list tagged questions.

questionIds.title: Question IDs
questionIds.description: Specific Stack Overflow question IDs to fetch.

userIds.title: User IDs
userIds.description: Specific Stack Overflow user IDs to fetch (saved to a separate 'users' dataset).

sort.title: Sort By
sort.description: Order questions by votes, activity, creation date, or hot.

includeBody.title: Include Question Body
includeBody.description: If enabled, the full question body text is included.

maxResults.title: Max Questions
maxResults.description: Maximum number of questions to scrape (across searches/tags).

apiKey.title: Stack Apps API Key (optional)
apiKey.description: A Stack Apps API key raises the daily quota from 300 to 10,000 requests. Register at stackapps.com/apps/oauth/register.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Rotating proxies help multiply the per-IP daily quota.
